videos.title: Yachts anchored off the Marbella coast
videos.description: Aerial drone view of two motor yachts anchored off the Marbella coastline with the Sierra Blanca mountains behind.

videos.title: Departing Puerto Banús by yacht
videos.description: Bow-shot of a charter yacht slipping out of Puerto Banús marina past the working fleet, with Hotel Benabola in the background.

videos.title: Boat party in Marbella
videos.description: Group of guests on the flybridge of a luxury yacht enjoying a sunny day in Puerto Banús.

videos.title: All drinks included — fridge on board
videos.description: Our on-board fridge stocked with cava, white wine, beer, soft drinks and water — included with every Marbella charter.

videos.title: Astondoa 40 'Fufi' at anchor off Marbella
videos.description: Drone view of our Astondoa 40 'Fufi' anchored off the Marbella coastline alongside another fleet yacht — typical mid-day swim stop.

videos.title: Chef-prepared fruit platter on the Mangusta 80
videos.description: Fresh fruit platter — pineapple, papaya, strawberries, raspberries, grapes and blueberries — served on the Mangusta 80 main saloon.

videos.title: Azimut 39 cruising the Marbella coast
videos.description: Drone tracking shot of the Azimut 39 motor yacht cruising at speed along the Marbella coastline with the Sierra Blanca mountains behind.

videos.title: Mangusta 80 (White) — stern with Sea-Doo jet ski
videos.description: Stern view of our Mangusta 80 'Nina' in Puerto Banús showing the Sea-Doo jet ski mounted on the swim platform — free for guests during the charter.
